entry.title: Find the best midfilder for Man Utd in 2025/2026

link.title: Find the best midfilder for Man Utd in 2025/2026

entry.content:
In this post, we will try to fix Manchester United's midfield problems in the 2025/2026 season.
What are we missing in the midfield? ======
How can we find the right player profile ======
Do some analytics magic. ------
entry.summary: In this post, we will try to fix Manchester United’s midfield problems in the 2025/2026 season.

entry.title: Shot map of your fave game last weekend

link.title: Shot map of your fave game last weekend

entry.content:
You've watched a great derby last weekend in which your favourite team had tons of shots on goal, but so did the opponent. In this blog we will write a script that will plot a map of all shots taken during the game.
The shot map ======
Python code ======
``` import soccerdata as sd ```
------
entry.summary: You’ve watched a great derby last weekend in which your favourite team had tons of shots on goal, but so did the opponent. In this blog we will write a script that will plot a map of all shots taken during the game.
